---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour in StonX
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Java Version: [e.g. 17.0.8]
- Node Version: [e.g. 20.x] (for frontend issues)
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124] (for frontend issues)
